## What changed?

<!-- In plain language: what skill did you add or update, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Updated an existing skill (small fix or clarification)
- [ ] Updated an existing skill (new section or capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (major restructure — explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I used Cursor or Claude Code to edit files under `skills/` (or used the `_template` folder for a new skill)
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has frontmatter with `name` and `description`
- [ ] The folder name matches the `name` in frontmatter (e.g. folder `research-plan` → `name: research-plan`)
- [ ] Version is updated if the skill behavior changed
- [ ] I added or updated examples in `references/` if needed
- [ ] I read the skill out loud — would a teammate understand what to do?
